title: Single Diamond Return
description: You can smelt gold & iron tools & armor into gold & iron nuggets, so why can't you smelt diamond armor & tools into diamonds, this datapack adds that
body:
You can smelt gold & iron tools & armor into gold & iron nuggets, so why can't you smelt diamond armor & tools into diamonds, this datapack adds that # Recipes can be found in the [gallery](https://modrinth.com/datapack/single-diamond-return/gallery) ### Credits Developers: [@kc123552](https://modrinth.com/user/kc123552)
Tools: [Misode Datapack Builder](https://misode.github.io)
